title: tiny light bulbs
description: tiny light bulbs to hide lights anywhere you need to.  Block slab and bulb form
body:
Adds tiny light bulbs in the game, dyeable for free after you place them

See screenshots and GIFs below
 

Each of the 4 Light Bulb blocks can be dyed in-world without crafting
![dye in world](https://i.imgur.com/aVdSiEn.gif)


![easy crafting](https://i.imgur.com/QFQuHNZ.gif)

Example config file


https://github.com/Lothrazar/TinyLightBulbs/blob/trunk/1.18/tinylightbulbs.toml

Previous versions (1.18 1.19) are compatible with [shimmer light](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/shimmer), and this might come to 1.20.1 in the future if they port the forge version
